nodes.x: PRAISE ye the LORD. Praise ye the LORD from the heavens: praise him in the heights.
PSALM OXLVOoL Ps ‘All creation exhoried to praise’ God. RAISE ye the Lord. Praise ye the. Lord » from’.:the: nesters} § praise him in the heights, - Hee
Hallelujah, meaning praise ye the Lord: that is, praise Jehovah - there are 4 Alleluias in this section.
Praise ye the Lord: Praise him who all things did create; Praise him who all things did redeem; Exalt his name and seek his faceO praise ye the Lord.
Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts.
Praise ye him, sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light.

nodes.lb: Liturgy: Machzor Rosh Hashanah Ashkenaz, The Morning Prayers, Yehi Kevod 10
nodes.x: Praise God. Praise Adonoy from the sky; Praise Him in the heights! Praise Him, all His angels; Praise Him, all His hosts! Praise Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all the stars of light. Praise Him, skies of skies, and the waters that are above the skies.122Bereishis 1:6-7 indicates that there are waters above the heavens. They will praise the Name of Adonoy, for He commanded it and they were…
4 (8:12) none listed sun, moon, stars, day and night third part of the sun, moon, and stars smitten and darkened
Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that [be] above the heavens.

nodes.lb: Liturgy: Weekday Siddur Sefard Linear, The Morning Prayers, Ashrei 141
nodes.x: and the waters that are above the skies.23Genesis 1:6-7 indicates that there are waters above the heavens.

nodes.lb: Liturgy: Shabbat Siddur Sefard Linear, The Morning Prayers, Ashrei 141
nodes.x: and the waters that are above the skies.51Genesis 1:6-7 indicates that there are waters above the heavens.
8 And all the waters shall be joined with the waters: that which is above the heavens is the masculine,
Let them praise the name of the LORD: for he commanded, and they were created.
He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a decree which shall not pass.
Praise the LORD from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps:
Fire, and hail; snow, and vapour; stormy wind fulfilling his word:
Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars:
Cedar and oak, were the materials of which idols were made and the mountains and hills were where they were placed.
KJV: And upon all the high mountains, and upon all the hills [that are] lifted up,
Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl:

nodes.lb: Liturgy: Machzor Rosh Hashanah Ashkenaz Linear, Musaf, First Day of Rosh Hashana, Zikhronot 72-78
nodes.x: “And God remembered No’ach and all the beasts and all the cattle
Beasts Or "cattle." From the word meaning "being speechless."
Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth:
Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children:
Let them praise the name of the LORD: for his name alone is excellent; his glory [is] above the earth and heaven.
He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; [even] of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye the LORD.
